assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: business owners and marketers spending on Meta ads without a clear evidence-backed diagnosis

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Campaign structure is useful only when it supports the advertiser's objective, evidence, and operating needs.
creative_strategy.message_angle: The audit evaluates structure contextually rather than rewarding one universal setup.
creative_strategy.hook: Structure should make decisions easier to read.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A modular architecture model will express readable organization without implying a single best account structure.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a modular building model with campaign, audience, creative, and measurement rooms
visual_direction.action: movable partitions align around one central business objective while alternative layouts remain possible
visual_direction.environment: a dark architectural strategy studio with no screens
visual_direction.composition: cutaway building centered, movable modules visible, broad upper-left copy field
visual_direction.lighting: precise white task light with lime objective core and cyan measurement edges
visual_direction.style: premium architectural model photography with analytical restraint

copy.overlay_headline: Structure should make decisions easier to read.
copy.caption: A useful account structure supports clear decisions. Zenta reviews campaigns, audiences, creative, measurement, and objectives in their actual context.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a modular building model with campaign, audience, creative, and measurement rooms. Show movable partitions align around one central business objective while alternative layouts remain possible. Set the scene in a dark architectural strategy studio with no screens. Composition: cutaway building centered, movable modules visible, broad upper-left copy field. Lighting: precise white task light with lime objective core and cyan measurement edges. Visual style: premium architectural model photography with analytical restraint. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'The audit evaluates structure contextually rather than rewarding one universal setup.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Structure should make decisions easier to read.', support line '$175 Full Meta Ads Audit', and CTA 'Review the account structure' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid one-size-fits-all diagrams, platform UI, skyscraper cliches, health scores or green-check overload, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
one-size-fits-all diagrams, platform UI, skyscraper cliches, health scores or green-check overload

accessibility.alt_text: A modular account building aligns several rooms around one central business objective.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $175 price and full-audit scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
